data.title: NY non-profit alerts on scams related to 2026 prescription drug cap; serves 3.6M seniors; tackling Medicare fraud.
data.description: In Albany, New York on January 13, 2026, The New York StateWide Senior Action Council (StateWide) revealed its selection for Medicare Fraud of the Month. Established 54 years ago, StateWide is a non-profit entity committed to advocating for the interests and health of over 3.6 million senior residents in the state.

data.title: Batteries Plus climbs 10 spots to rank No. 281 on Entrepreneur Magazine's Franchise 500 list. Top battery service franchise.
data.description: A franchise specializing in battery and power solutions has seen a significant advancement, moving up 10 places to reach No. 281 on the latest rankings. Batteries Plus, based in HARTLAND, Wis., achieved this feat according to the report released on Jan. 13, 2026. The franchise is considered the nation's top service center in the industry, and its position on the list demonstrates its strong performance. The company has been included in the prestigious top 500 list, highlighting its growing influence and market presence.

data.title: TORAD Inc. achieves peak efficiency of 72.5% with spool compressor, addresses global warming. Enables commercial AC without emissions.
data.description: TORAD Inc., a company specializing in compressor technology, recently revealed a breakthrough achievement with their patented spool compressor, known as Zero-Global-Warming Solstice® ZE. The compressor has achieved an impressive peak efficiency of 72.5%, a milestone that paves the way for commercial air conditioning systems that won't contribute to global warming. This development was announced on January 13, 2026, marking a significant step towards environmentally friendly cooling solutions.

data.title: Canyon Ranch unveils Wellness Gold List for 2026, recognizing  top products and trends, evaluated by hundreds of experts.
data.description: Fort Worth, Texas - On January 13, 2026, Canyon Ranch introduced its inaugural Wellness Gold List, compiled through unbiased assessments by numerous experts boasting extensive experience. This list highlights the top products, tools, and emerging trends within the wellness industry.

data.title: Great American Media unveils new movie "Blessings in Disguise" for Easter, starring Shae Robins & Casey Elliott, showing love, craft, faith in everyday life. (Character count: 129)
data.description: Great American Media has revealed the upcoming release of a new original movie titled Blessings in Disguise, featuring Shae Robins and Casey Elliott in lead roles. The heartfelt film delves into the intertwining of love, craft, and faith in ordinary life. Scheduled to premiere on January 13, 2026 in New York, this production aims to captivate audiences with its profound narrative. Stay tuned for an inspiring cinematic experience that promises to resonate with viewers.

data.title: "Precision Guided Munitions Market to Surge in Europe; Report Forecast 2025-2033 with U.S. Collaboration. - ResearchAndMarkets.com"
data.description: Dublin - A new report titled "Precision Guided Munitions - Market and Technology Forecast to 2033" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report offers a comprehensive analysis of the Precision Guided Munition market from 2025 to 2033, covering key factors such as demand drivers, trends, and challenges. It also presents an overview of spending across different regions and segments, while highlighting the introduction of innovative technologies. Precision guided munitions play a crucial role in modern warfare strategies.

data.title: "Missiles Market Forecast Report 2025-2033 examines missile technologies, markets, and spending over 8 years. Focus on top 95% global markets."
data.description: A report titled "Missiles - Market and Technology Forecast to 2033" has been included in the offering of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report delves into the analysis and prediction of missile technologies, markets, and expenditures for the period 2025-2033. Focusing on the top 95% of global markets in the United States, Europe, and Asia, it explores the evolution of missile systems geographically. The study provides insights into the market size and trends of the global missile market over the next 8 years.
